setup-worktree: if [ -f "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/package-lock.json" ]; then npm install; elif [ -f "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/pnpm-lock.yaml" ]; then pnpm install; elif [ -f "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/yarn.lock" ]; then yarn install; elif [ -f "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/requirements.txt" ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; elif [ -f "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/Pipfile" ]; then pipenv install; elif [ -f "$ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH/pyproject.toml" ]; then pip install -e .; fi
echo '✅ Worktree ready for agent execution.'
